verdicts.note: Fiscal responsibility and testing programs for necessity and effectiveness support restraint, but not the maximal spending-cut pole.
No elected record supports renewal, while documented business, education, and public-service experience makes the maximal outsider score too strong.

review_notes: All 3 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (2 adjust, 1 upheld). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier evidence for a supported missing proposal.
